summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of new ProjectCard and MiniSparkline components. All 11 features verified working correctly with 100% pass rate.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Known recharts race condition during initial render that self-resolves. Not blocking.

passed_tests: Dashboard - ProjectCard component renders for each project (data-testid='project-card-{project_id}') ✓
Dashboard - Project name displays in card header ✓
Dashboard - Current valuation shows value ($8.0M) or 'No valuation yet' ✓
Dashboard - Exit Readiness score displays (52/100 placeholder for projects with valuations, '—' for 0 valuations) ✓
Dashboard - Last updated date shows with Calendar icon ('Updated Feb 28, 2026') ✓
Dashboard - MiniSparkline renders (colored line for 2+ valuations, placeholder bars for <2) ✓
Dashboard - CTA shows 'Start Valuation' when 0 valuations ✓
Dashboard - CTA shows 'Update Valuation' + View Report icon when has valuations ✓
Dashboard - Delete button works (trash icon visible on hover with opacity transition) ✓
Dashboard - Recent valuations footer shows when has valuations (lists last 2 valuations) ✓
Dashboard - Sparkline is green (#10B981) for positive trend (verified in code and visually) ✓
Dashboard - All CTA buttons navigate correctly (Start Valuation, Update Valuation, View Report, Recent links) ✓

features_verified: Shows currentValue from latestValuation.result.base or 'No valuation yet'
Exit readiness placeholder (52) shown when hasValuations=true
Delete button has opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition
CTAs: 'Start Valuation' (0 vals) vs 'Update Valuation' + FileText icon (has vals)
Recent footer shows top 2 valuations with company_name and value
Uses MiniSparkline component for valuation trend visualization
Uses recharts AreaChart with gradient fill
Sorts valuations by date ascending and takes last 6 points
Shows placeholder bars when <2 data points
Determines trend: isPositive = last >= first value
Green color (#10B981) for positive trend, red (#EF4444) for negative
ProjectCard integrated in grid layout (1-3 columns responsive)
Passes valuations, onDelete, formatCurrency, formatDate props
Grid uses gap-6 spacing between cards

critical_code_review_comments: ProjectCard correctly implements all required features per requirements
MiniSparkline handles edge cases (0-1 valuations shows placeholder bars)
Delete button hover transition works via Tailwind opacity classes
Exit Readiness is a hardcoded placeholder (52) - will need backend integration in future
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from iteration_9/10: 2 projects (proj_snapshot_1772294140681 with 2 valuations, proj_snapshot2_1772294140681 with 0 valuations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProjectCard and MiniSparkline components fully tested and working. Key: ProjectCard uses data-testid='project-card-{project_id}', filters valuations internally, shows Exit Readiness placeholder (52), delete button appears on hover. MiniSparkline shows green for positive trend (#10B981), red for negative (#EF4444), placeholder bars for <2 data points. Test data: user_dashboard_snapshot_1772294140681 has 2 projects - one with 2 valuations ($8M, $6M) showing positive trend sparkline, one with 0 valuations showing placeholder.
